# [PHASE 7] Backend - Student Functions

## Phase Overview
- **Phase Number**: 7
- **Phase Title**: Student Panel
- **Estimated Duration**: Week 7-8
- **Dependencies**: Phase 5 Complete, Academics Backend
- **Estimated Hours**: 12

## Task Description
Implement student-specific backend functions

## Detailed Requirements
- [ ] getMyGrades() - own grades
- [ ] getMyAttendance() - own attendance
- [ ] getMyTimetable() - own schedule
- [ ] getMyAssignments() - pending/completed assignments
- [ ] getMyWalletBalance() - eWallet balance
- [ ] getMyReportCards() - downloadable report cards
- [ ] getAnnouncements() - school announcements
- [ ] submitAssignment() - submit work

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All backend functions implemented and tested
- [ ] All frontend pages created and responsive
- [ ] Integration tests passing
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Code review approved

## Files to Create/Modify
`convex/modules/portal/student/queries.ts`, `convex/modules/portal/student/mutations.ts`

## Testing Requirements
- [ ] Unit tests for all functions
- [ ] Integration tests for workflows
- [ ] E2E tests for critical user journeys
- [ ] Performance tests if applicable

This task is part of Phase 7: Student Panel and must be completed according to the implementation plan specifications.
